title: cunila pulegioides
intro: Cunila pulegioides, also known as Mexican oregano, is a flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The medicinal properties of Cunila pulegioides lie in its essential oils, which have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving digestive issues, and fighting off respiratory infections. Cunila pulegioides can be prepared as an herbal tea, used in traditional cooking, or made into a topical cream to utilize its medicinal properties.
